name: system
description: /system — campaign control-tower (domain-agnostic) with a code-level decision harness (0.7.0). One persistent mission-control over EVERY in-flight job of a long-running campaign across ANY execution surface (rented pods via cloud · pool hosts · local procs). Ties the manifest (cwd ./pods.json) + event-driven watchers + harvest+verdict + the autonomous harvest→re-dispatch loop into one command. NOT domain-locked — DFT sweeps · ML training fleets · build matrices · render farms · any N-parallel-job campaign with a queued backlog. Verbs: bare/status (unified dashboard) · tick [--apply] (NEW 0.7.0 — deterministic probe→classify→decide pass via bin/system_harness.hexa; partitions auto-handled vs LLM-escalate, executes resume itself with --apply) · watch · harvest [<id>] · next/redispatch · auto · drive · stop · cost · queue [add|rm|ls] · upstream. The 0.7.0 harness replaces the human-facing 'pick option 1/2/3/4' menu with a fixed decision table (exit-code-aware terminal taxonomy + autonomy contract); the LLM acts only on the escalate partition. Triggers: /system · 관제탑 · 캠페인 현황 · mission control · campaign status · 결과보고 추가발사 · 자율 재발사 루프 · control tower · 후보 자율 · tick.
